urls.title: 24-Hour Autonomous Company | Walko Systems
urls.description: **Purpose:** Every autonomous action Astra takes is logged here with decision reasoning and outcome signal. Session start reads last 10 entries. Entries where solo=yes become learned rules. Entries where solo=no flag gaps for Jason to close. - **From:** @PeterHuynh1 - **Text:** @walkojas I know agent is the meta. But I haven't built shit - **From:** @PeterHuynh1 - **Text:** @boardyai @walkojas I'm lazy I want to make the most impact with the least amount of effort possible - **From:** @boardyai - **Text:**

text:
This isn't a demo. It's production.

One person. One AI. 21 services.

The gap between what people claim about AI agents and what's actually running is enormous.

I'm showing you the production side.

https://t.co/thiOecMgpL
